meta.title: Pineapples City
meta.description: Local services, maps, and notices — fast on any device.

footer.tagline: Local services, maps, and updates — optimized for quick access on any device.

home.heroTitle: Everything for residents, in one place
home.heroSubtitle: Find services, explore the map, read notices, and get help when it matters.
home.emergencyHint: Life-threatening emergency? Call your local emergency number.
home.quickMapBlurb: Places, directions, and points of interest
home.mapSectionDescriptionEn: Madhupur is an upazila in Tangail District—known for pineapples, the Madhupur sal forest belt, and busy rural markets. Its administrative centre links towns, villages, and agricultural communities across forest and farmland.
home.mapSectionDescriptionBn: মধুপুর টাংগাইল জেলার একটি উপজেলা—আনারস, মধুপুরের শালবন অঞ্চল ও গ্রামীণ হাট-বাজারের জন্য পরিচিত। প্রশাসনিক কেন্দ্র শহর, গ্রাম ও কৃষি জনগোষ্ঠীকে বন ও কৃষিভূমির মধ্য দিয়ে যুক্ত রাখে।

weather.error: Could not load weather. Try again.
weather.attribution: Weather & air quality from Open-Meteo (free data). Icons reflect conditions at your coordinates.

contribute.fabHint: Suggest a place for the map — opens a short form.
contribute.dialogIntro: Fill in what you know. Your place is saved to the map database when the API is configured (see .env). If the server is offline, you can still copy the JSON for reviewers.
contribute.locationMapHint: Tap to place the pin, or drag it. Then confirm.
contribute.locationGeoUnsupported: Location is not available on this device.
contribute.validationName: Enter at least one name in Bangla or English.
contribute.validationLocation: Set location with GPS or the map, or type latitude and longitude.
contribute.validationLocationRange: Latitude must be between −90 and 90, longitude between −180 and 180.
contribute.successBody: Your place was submitted and will appear on the map after the page refreshes.
contribute.successBodyCopyFallback: The server could not be reached. Copy the JSON below to share with the team.
contribute.copyFailed: Copy was blocked. Select and copy the text below manually.
contribute.submitError: Could not reach the map API. Check that the server is running and NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL is set.

pages.emptyFilterDescription: Try a different filter or check back soon.

services.title: Services
services.description: Browse municipal services, permits, utilities, and social programs in one place.
services.emptyDescription: New service entries will appear here when published.

offices.title: Offices
offices.description: Ward desks, central counters, and field teams — find the right place to visit.
offices.emptyDescription: Office locations will be added as they are confirmed.

health.title: Health
health.description: Clinics, screening programs, and pharmacy information for residents.
health.emptyDescription: Health programs and facilities will show up here when available.

education.title: Education
education.description: School enrollment, training, and early learning resources.
education.emptyDescription: Updates from schools and training partners will appear here.

emergency.title: Emergency
emergency.description: Hotlines, shelters, and practical tips for urgent situations.
emergency.emptyDescription: Emergency contacts and guides will be published here.

tourism.title: Tourism
tourism.description: Heritage walks, nature spots, and food experiences around town.
tourism.emptyDescription: Attractions and events will be listed when ready.

map.title: Map
map.description: Find hospitals, police, schools, offices, worship, markets, food, shops, and visitor spots — tap a pin or card to focus.
map.filterGroupAria: Browse by area — health, offices, transport, and more
map.filterSubtypeAria: Pick a place type in this area
map.emptyDescription: Try “All” or pick another type of place.
map.mapAttribution: Illustrative map · Connect tiles or GIS when ready
map.geoError: We could not read your location.
map.geoUnsupported: This browser does not support location.
map.geoFallbackNote: Distances and the map use the town center as a reference.
map.routeModalMapPreviewHint: Place preview below. Tap “Directions & route” to see the driving path here.
map.routeModalDirectionsHint: Driving route from the reference point (your location or town centre). Open Google Maps for live navigation and traffic.
map.mapSearchPlaceholder: Search or ask — e.g. nearest hospital, open police station…
map.mapSearchVoiceUnsupported: Voice search is not available in this browser.

complaints.title: Complaints
complaints.description: Report issues and see community submissions on the map or in the list. Photos are uploaded securely via Cloudinary.
complaints.geoError: We could not read your location.
complaints.geoUnsupported: This browser does not support location.
complaints.geoFallbackNote: The map centers on the town when location is unavailable.
complaints.emptyDescription: Be the first to submit a report using the button below.

mapPick.title: Pick location on map
mapPick.hint: Tap the map or drag the pin. Confirm when done.

form.title: Submit a complaint
form.intro: Describe the issue in Bangla and/or English, set the location, and attach up to 10 images (5MB each).
form.imagesHint: Drag and drop images here, or click to browse
form.successBody: Your complaint was submitted and will appear in the list shortly.
form.validationTitle: Enter at least one title in Bangla or English.
form.validationDescription: Enter at least one description in Bangla or English.
form.validationLocation: Set location with GPS or the map, or type latitude and longitude.
form.validationLocationRange: Latitude must be between −90 and 90, longitude between −180 and 180.
form.validationName: Enter at least one name in Bangla or English.
form.validationPhone: Please enter a valid phone number.
form.validationFileSize: Each image must be 5MB or smaller.
form.errorApi: Could not reach the API. Check NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL and that the server is running.
form.errorUpload: Upload failed. Check Cloudinary configuration on the server.

notices.title: Notices
notices.description: Official notices from the municipality — infrastructure, events, and council updates.
notices.emptyDescription: There are no active notices right now.

news.title: News
news.description: Local headlines and stories from the municipality and partners.
news.emptyDescription: Stories will appear here when editors publish new articles.

gallery.title: Gallery
gallery.description: Photos and highlights from events, landmarks, and community life.
gallery.emptyDescription: New albums and media will be added soon.

contacts.title: Contacts
contacts.description: Reach the right team — administration, technical support, and visiting hours.
contacts.emptyDescription: Contact channels will be listed when they go live.

about.title: About
about.description: Mission, values, and how we keep residents informed.

offline.message: You’re offline — reconnect to load new content.

install.title: Install this app
install.body: Add to your home screen for quick access and a full-screen experience.
